3133830.name: Fantasy Grounds - Alone in the Dark Shadowdark RPG Bundle
3133830.description:
Alone in the Dark Shadowdark RPG Bundle

This bundle for the Shandowdark RPG ruleset contains the following items.
SOLODARK: SOLO RULES
This supplement gives you the resources, roll tables, and alternate rules you need to play Shadowdark RPG by yourself, without a Game Master.
SoloDark is intuitive and complements the core Shadowdark RPG rules. Aim to roll high, and keep your d20s handy!
Inside, you'll find:
  • An elegant
    Oracle system to answer yes/no questions.
  • A d100
    Prompt table to spark unexpected ideas and twists.
  • A d100
    Dungeon Name generator for endless adventuring sites.
  • A list of solo
    resources by category: NPCs, Dungeons, Monsters, and more!
FIVE MINI ADVENTURES
These handy adventures give you all you need to run: 
  • An 
    antediluvian 
    monolith  full of ancient, writhing horrors and sinister beings (received 
    The Best  rating from Bryce Lynch, tenfootpole org), 3rd level
  • An 
    opulent 
    prison-palace  sinking into the sea where a deadly poison grows, 4th level
  • A temple where 
    cultists of the 
    Elephant God  jealously guard a legendary jewel, 6th level
  • A 
    twisted cavern  full of pirate treasure and pale, bloodsucking stingbats, 4th level
  • A 
    leprechaun's redoubt  where fey trickery hides a fabled pot of gold, 3rd level.
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Michael Putlack, Allen Dodge, and Kevin Heffernan
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Shadowdark RPG ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
